codeReview.summary: Implementation is complete and correct. The worker added YAML appendix support using js-yaml library, with proper extraction functions and error handling for yaml-parse and appendix-missing error types. Both JSON and YAML appendices are validated against the same schema.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The linter requires js-yaml package but there is no package.json in tooling/ui-md-linter/ documenting this dependency. js-yaml appears to be available globally in the environment, but this is not documented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: tooling/ui-md-linter/ui-md-lint.js:8 — const yaml = require('js-yaml'); No package.json exists in tooling/ui-md-linter/ to track this dependency

summary: Feature implementation passes review. YAML appendix support added correctly with js-yaml library integration, extractYamlAppendix() and extractAppendix() functions, and proper error handling. All verification tests pass including existing JSON files and new YAML test file. One noted observation about missing package.json dependency documentation.
